steps.text: {toy} declares this is now a morning expedition!
Pick a room you have not really LOOKED at today and tiptoe in.
Find three things in that room you have never noticed before.
Pick a favorite of the three and tell {toy} a fact about it.
Plant {toy} as a flag — this room has been officially explored!
{toy} has an idea: invent a brand-new game in five minutes!
Pick one object from anywhere in the room — that is the main piece.
Make up ONE rule for how to use it.
Try the game with {toy} as your opponent.
Give your new game a silly name and announce it to the room.
Tell {toy} the most interesting thing that happened today.
{toy} 'tells' you a make-believe story about its own day — make one up!
Trade the silliest detail from each story.
Pick which story was funnier and explain why.
Promise {toy} a new story tomorrow.
Sit somewhere cozy with {toy}.
Think of one good thing that happened today and whisper it to {toy}.
Think of a second good thing and whisper that one too.
Think of a third good thing — say it loud enough for {toy} to hear.
Give {toy} a hug. Three good things is a good day.
Sit face-to-face with {toy}.
Make the silliest face you can, and hold it for five seconds.
Now make the most surprised face you can.
Now make the sleepiest face you can.
Decide which of {toy}'s 'reactions' was the funniest. Take a tiny bow.
